meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the perfect 'Aha!' moment. Use Claude Code to iterate through micro-SaaS concepts by building functional prototypes in hours, not weeks. By combining Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding with Claude’s reasoning, you can validate market demand through rapid MVP deployment, turning stagnant ideation into profitable, production-ready codebases.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. As a founder, the 'no project ideas' paralysis isn't a lack of creativity—it's a lack of feedback loops. You are stuck because you are trying to conceive a perfect product in a vacuum, rather than shipping a functional experiment to a hungry market.

True innovation happens in the friction between your code and the user. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you shift from passive brainstorming to aggressive, iterative building. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a high-velocity engine that turns your technical intuition into revenue-generating assets before the competition even finishes their pitch deck.

steps.title: Architecting the MVP Scope
steps.description: Define a high-value, low-complexity niche tool. Use Antigravity to map out the core data model and API surface area to ensure the MVP remains focused on the primary value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a schema and core architectural outline for a micro-SaaS that solves [insert problem niche]. Focus on minimal viable features for a 48-hour build.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config set --prompt 'Draft the directory structure and technical requirements based on the Antigravity architecture output.'

steps.title: Initializing the Project Scaffold
steps.description: Set up your environment with production-ready standards. Ensure authentication, database connection, and logging are configured before writing business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate setup for a Node.js/TypeScript backend with Supabase integration. Include error handling and standard logging middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the project structure and install necessary dependencies based on the Antigravity scaffold.'

steps.title: Rapid Logic Injection
steps.description: Implement the core AI feature. Use Claude Code to translate your business logic into clean, testable functions, ensuring the AI agent handles edge cases effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a core service function that processes user input using LangChain and returns a structured JSON response. Include validation logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the core service logic in src/services/ai-engine.ts, following the architectural guidelines provided.'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation
steps.description: Before deploying, ensure your code is bulletproof. Use Claude Code to generate unit tests that cover critical failure points discovered during development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest tests for the core service logic, covering successful inference, API failures, and rate-limiting scenarios.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run the generated test suite and fix any regressions found in the main service logic.'

steps.title: Deployment & Feedback Loop
steps.description: Ship the MVP to a staging environment. This finalizes the technical setup and allows you to start collecting real-world data immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel-ready deployment configuration and a CI/CD pipeline script for automated testing on push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure the deployment pipeline and verify the production build process.'

pro_tips: Treat your codebase as a disposable asset; if an idea doesn't gain traction in 7 days, refactor the core logic into a new domain using Claude's context-aware refactoring.
Always force Claude Code to generate type-safe code; catching errors at compile-time saves hours of debugging during MVP demos.
Use Antigravity to document your API contracts; this ensures that as your project scales, your frontend and backend stay perfectly synced.
Leverage Claude's ability to read your entire repository by providing specific file paths in your prompts to maintain architectural consistency across large files.
Implement a 'kill switch' in your MVP logic early on; it allows you to toggle features off if user feedback indicates they are distracting from the primary value.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, gather feedback from 10 potential users within 48 hours to validate your core hypothesis before committing to further feature development.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start engineering your success. Every hour you spend planning instead of building is an hour you lose to the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
